encounters.trigger: You pry open the pressurized door, alerting the guard construct to your presence.

pickup.effect: Allows access to the unstable core cooling systems.

encounters.hazard: Electrified water patches that drain health over time

enemy.weakness: Concentrated flame blast from Pyromancer's Thermal Gauntlets

pickup.name: High-Pressure Oxygen Tank

encounters.hazard: Rapidly falling debris from the crumbling structural supports.

enemy.name: Bioluminescent Abyssal Eel
enemy.weakness: Superheated oxygen bubbles created by the High-Pressure Oxygen Tank.

encounters.hazard: Extreme pressure currents that push the player into wall spikes.

enemy.name: Corrupted Security Drone

encounters.trigger: The drone's explosion destabilizes the coolant rods, forcing the boss to emerge from the core.

pickup.effect: A rare material that amplifies fire damage against metallic surfaces.

encounters.hazard: Unpredictable jets of steam bursting from the floor vents.

pickup.effect: Slows movement speed of nearby enemies.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the altar causes the jaguar to phase into reality.

encounters.hazard: Quicksand pools that teleport the player back to the start of the zone.

pickup.name: Crystalline Root
pickup.effect: Increases spell casting speed.

encounters.trigger: Crossing the bridge activates the shambler from a dormant fungal pile.

encounters.hazard: Time-tears that age the player, reducing movement speed.

pickup.name: Essence of Eternity
pickup.effect: Allows player to rewind health to 50% once per fight.

encounters.trigger: Stealing the artifact from the altar awakens the final construct.

boss.name: Forgotten Time-Keeper
boss.victory_condition: Expose the Keeper's vulnerability by using the Essence to reverse its final phase attack.

normalized.objective: Retrieve the Chronos Keystone from the heart of the jungle.
normalized.reward: The Chronos Keystone: Permanently unlocks the ability to dash through time.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Jaguar triggers the collapse of the path ahead, revealing the Ancient Catacombs.

pickup.name: Sun-Bleached Idol
pickup.effect: Increases rage generation

encounters.hazard: Thick poisonous fog that drains health over time

encounters.trigger: Shattering the Guardian activates the main mechanism to the ritual altar.

pickup.name: Obsidian Blade Fragment
pickup.effect: Enables critical strikes on magical entities

encounters.hazard: Floor tiles that snap and cause bleeding damage

encounters.trigger: Cleansing the Shade opens the gate to the inner sanctum where the boss awaits.

pickup.name: Sacred Lotus
pickup.effect: Allows the player to survive one fatal blow

encounters.hazard: Swamp gas pockets that reduce visibility to zero

output.objective: Purge the jungle of the necrotic corruption spreading from the inner sanctum.

boss.name: Ancient Serpent God
boss.victory_condition: Strike the boss's core while under the effect of the Sacred Lotus

output.setting: A forgotten, rotting jungle civilization where the nature has turned hostile and gray.
output.reward: The Heart of the Jungle - An artifact granting permanent berserker endurance.
